inputs.label: Ball Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the baseball in ounces. MLB regulations: 5 to 5.25 ounces.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the baseball in ounces. MLB regulations: 5 to 5.25 ounces.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beyzbol topunun ons cinsinden kütlesi. MLB kuralları: 5 ila 5,25 ons.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Baseballs in Unzen. MLB-Vorschriften: 5 bis 5,25 Unzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la balle de baseball en onces. Règlement MLB : 5 à 5,25 onces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la pelota de béisbol en onzas. Reglamento MLB: 5 a 5.25 onzas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة كرة البيسبول بالأوقية. لوائح MLB: 5 إلى 5.25 أوقية.

inputs.label: Effective Bat Mass
inputs.businessContext: Effective mass of the bat at the impact point, typically less than total bat weight. Default is for a standard wood bat.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective mass of the bat at the impact point, typically less than total bat weight. Default is for a standard wood bat.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma noktasında sopanın etkin kütlesi, genellikle toplam sopa ağırlığından azdır. Varsayılan standart bir tahta sopa içindir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektive Masse des Schlägers am Aufprallpunkt, typischerweise geringer als das Gesamtgewicht. Standardwert für einen Holzschläger.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse effective de la batte au point d'impact, généralement inférieure au poids total de la batte. Valeur par défaut pour une batte en bois standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa efectiva del bate en el punto de impacto, típicamente menor que el peso total del bate. El valor predeterminado es para un bate de madera estándar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الفعالة للمضرب عند نقطة الاصطدام، عادة أقل من الوزن الإجمالي للمضرب. القيمة الافتراضية لمضرب خشبي قياسي.

inputs.label: Pitch Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the pitched ball as it crosses the plate, in miles per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the pitched ball as it crosses the plate, in miles per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atılan topun plakayı geçerkenki hızı, mil/saat cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des geworfenen Balls beim Überqueren der Platte, in Meilen pro Stunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de la balle lancée lorsqu'elle traverse le marbre, en miles par heure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de la pelota lanzada al cruzar el plato, en millas por hora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الكرة المقذوفة عند عبورها اللوحة، بالأميال في الساعة.

inputs.label: Bat Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the bat's sweet spot at the moment of impact, in miles per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the bat's sweet spot at the moment of impact, in miles per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma anında sopanın tatlı noktasının hızı, mil/saat cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des Sweet Spots des Schlägers im Moment des Aufpralls, in Meilen pro Stunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse du point idéal de la batte au moment de l'impact, en miles par heure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del punto dulce del bate en el momento del impacto, en millas por hora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة النقطة المثلى للمضرب عند لحظة الاصطدام، بالأميال في الساعة.

inputs.label: Coefficient of Restitution
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of restitution between ball and bat, typically 0.5 to 0.55 for wood bats.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of restitution between ball and bat, typically 0.5 to 0.55 for wood bats.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Top ve sopa arasındaki restitüsyon katsayısı, tahta sopalar için tipik olarak 0.5 ila 0.55.
businessContext_i18n.de: Restitutionskoeffizient zwischen Ball und Schläger, typischerweise 0,5 bis 0,55 bei Holzschlägern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de restitution entre la balle et la batte, typiquement 0,5 à 0,55 pour les battes en bois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de restitución entre la pelota y el bate, típicamente 0.5 a 0.55 para bates de madera.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الارتداد بين الكرة والمضرب، عادةً من 0.5 إلى 0.55 للمضارب الخشبية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
